title: Luffy Enters the War: Aftermath
description: In the Marineford War storyline, this section centers on Brook, Unknown person #8, Unknown person #7, Unknown person #36, Magellan, Unknown person #38 as the scene develops across pages 17–20.
scene: This scene advances the Marineford War conflict through Brook, Unknown person #8, Unknown person #7, Unknown person #36, Magellan, focusing on the immediate stakes of luffy enters the war: aftermath.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: He... He said that's shanks's crew.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #36
dialogue.text: I'd love to build this ship someday.

dialogue.speaker: Brook
dialogue.text: They call him the flying pirate.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Yes... I've been worried about him.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: I'm helping out, so it'll be fine!!

dialogue.speaker: Brook
dialogue.text: Sorry, laboon. I sailed on Roger's ship

dialogue.speaker: Brook
dialogue.text: This is tough!! 42 degrees is hard!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: He's inside. Do you want some juice?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: WHAT A REAL PIRATE IS LIKE.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #43
dialogue.text: How is the ex- permanent coming?

dialogue.speaker: Brook
dialogue.text: This is where it all began!!
